meta.title: The SBOM Challenge
meta.description:
The team from Idaho National Laboratory (INL) created and ran the Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) Challenge at S4x23. This video is the debrief of the Challenge by Ginger Wright and Hannah Pearson Kleinheider.

The participants in the Challenge included: aDolus, Cybeats, Finite State, Netrise, and Security Risk Advisors.

The goals of the SBOM Challenge were:
1. Create SBOMs from binary files
2. Identify vulnerabilities in the SBOM components
3. Take in and process a VEX

The creation and running of the Challenge was a challenge in itself, especially since this was the first time it was run.
